## Status: PASS

## Files Modified
- `C:/work/mega/memory/.claude/worktrees/feat-transcript-ingest/src/AstraMemory.Application/Features/TranscriptIngest/TranscriptIngestService.cs`
- `C:/work/mega/memory/.claude/worktrees/feat-transcript-ingest/tests/AstraMemory.Tests/TranscriptIngest/TranscriptIngestServiceTests.cs`

## Build / Test Output
- **TranscriptIngestServiceTests**: 7/7 PASS (4 updated + 3 new).
- **Regression** (`TranscriptScrubberTests|IdempotencyCacheTests|TranscriptIngestControllerTests|TranscriptExtractorTests|MemoryGraphLinkerTests`): 27/27 PASS (suite was larger than the 24 estimate in the spec).
- Build succeeded with only pre-existing NU1507 / NU1903 warnings.

## Commit
`0cabceff03b935d216ae669d83c1bb49179acf7c` ‚Äî `feat(api): wire TranscriptExtractor + MemoryGraphLinker into ingest service` ‚Äî 2 files changed, 162 insertions, 7 deletions.

## Self-Review
- Constructor now takes `(IMemoryWriteService, IdempotencyCache, ITranscriptExtractor, IMemoryGraphLinker)`.
- Idempotency replay short-circuits before extractor runs (unchanged code path).
- Auto-accept rule matches spec exactly: `Type is "decision" or "fact" or "event" && Importance >= 0.7 && EntityRefs.Count > 0` ‚Üí `"active"`, else `"pending"`. `lesson` is always pending.
- `extractedCount` increments only when `atomStored.ErrorStatus == 0`, and linker is invoked only on successful store.
- Atom metadata carries `title`, `entity_refs`, and `extracted_from` (parent summary id).
- Source = `claude-code-{event}-extract`, Tags = `["claude-code", "extracted", atom.Type]`.
- Added a null-coalesce on `extractor.ExtractAsync(...)` so the existing tests' `Mock.Of<ITranscriptExtractor>()` stubs (which return `null` `Task` results) don't NRE. This was implied by the spec ‚Äî the existing 4 tests use `Mock.Of<T>()` and rely on the extractor being a no-op.
- DI registrations intentionally NOT added (Task 2.5).

## Key Notes
- One small deviation from the literal spec: the service treats a null return from `extractor.ExtractAsync` as an empty list. Without this, `Mock.Of<ITranscriptExtractor>()` from the updated existing 4 tests blows up with NRE. The 3 new tests all configure the extractor explicitly, so they are unaffected.
- Regression suite produced 27 passing tests rather than the 24 estimated in the spec ‚Äî the underlying suites have grown since the plan was written. All pass.
